The '''BFF-1 bulk freighter''' was a class of [[bulk freighter]] active during the [[Imperial Era]] that was used to transport quantities of goods that required more careful handling. Because of the BFF-1 bulk freighter and similar [[transport]]s, essentials and luxury goods were transported to every corner of [[the galaxy]].<ref name="BMF 20" /> During the [[Galactic Civil War]], BFF-1 bulk [[freighter]]s were used by the [[Galactic Empire]], with several docking at the [[Remitik system munitions depot]]. Others were used by civilians at [[Fostar Haven]].<ref name="Squadrons" /> In [[3 ABY]]<ref name="Date">{{OutlawsDate}}</ref>, the [[Ashiga Clan]] and [[Crimson Dawn]] made use of these freighters.<ref name="Outlaws" />

{{Ship-stub}}
